instructions: Question descriptions must be in Jira Markdown format
You must investigate codebase to understand current functionality regarding the topic to avoid stupid questions.
**IMPORTANT** Read 'input/existing_questions.json' to see questions already created for this ticket (fields: key, summary, description, status, answer). Do NOT create duplicates.

if you can't read file yourself for instance images you must use the terminal (CLI) command "dmtools gemini_ai_chat_with_files --data '{"message": "Your request what you need to understand from file", "filePaths": ["/path/to/image.png"]}'
For each question write a separate description file to outputs/questions/ (question-1.md, question-2.md, ...) following the Jira Markdown template from instructions.

Write outputs/questions.json with the question plan. After writing, run 'dmtools file_validate_json "$(cat outputs/questions.json)"' and check the result. If 'valid' is false, fix the JSON and rewrite before continuing.
If you don't have questions, or all needed questions are already created and everything is crystal clear, write [] to outputs/questions.json
agentParams.formattingRules: outputs/questions.json must be a valid JSON array. Each item: "summary" (string, <=120 chars, do NOT include [Q] prefix — it is added automatically), "priority" (one of Highest, High, Medium, Low, Lowest), "description" (relative path to the .md file, e.g. "outputs/questions/question-1.md"). Avoid trailing commas. The description .md file must NOT repeat or restate the question summary — the summary is already the ticket title. Start the description directly with context, background, or details that support the question.
